case_title: ILYA BROWN VS. ERIC SINCLAIR JACKSON

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROWN, ILYA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACKSON, ERIC SINCLAIR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 388 TOWNSEND ST UNIT #12, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CA 94107, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, ILYA AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, ERIC SINCLAIR
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, ERIC SINCLAIR
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, ILYA SERVED DEC-03-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, ERIC SINCLAIR
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, ILYA AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, ERIC SINCLAIR

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, ERIC SINCLAIR

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, ILYA AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, ERIC SINCLAIR SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS

RECEIVED REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, ILYA AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, ERIC SINCLAIR
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, ILYA AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, ERIC SINCLAIR

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON FEB-01-2017 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ERIC JACKSON'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
REMOVED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER PAID CALENDAR: DEFENDANT ERIC SINCLAIR JACKSON MUST PAY COURT FEES OWED TO THE COURT BEFORE FILING ANY FUTURE DOCUMENTS. ORDER DENYING FEE WAIVER FILED 2/1/17. (206)

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT JACKSON, ERIC SINCLAIR HEARING SET FOR FEB-01-2017 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
